programmes.show_description: The last in the first series of the award-winning comedy sketch show co-written and performed by the versatile comedy actress. Are you bovvered?
Yungblud: Louis spends time with Dominic Harrison - aka singer and musician Yungblud - as he joins him during his whirlwind tour.
Cat and Mouse: With Samantha's family desperate for answers, Teddy sits down to answer Frederick's questions. As new information comes to light, one of Teddy's former students comes forward.
Shopping from Home.
The Guru: More domestic chaos in the long running sitcom. Ben's old friendship with a celebrity dentist causes problems, while Susan finds a new friendship at an Albanian airport.
Bringing Up Janey: Popular sitcom with Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker. Janey wants to keep her new man under wraps. Ben tries to expose an affair between Susan and a client.
A Very Brief Encounter: More farcical fun with the Harper family. Susan asks Ben to help an old girlfriend of hers through a divorce, but nearly precipitates her own.
A Difficult Undertaking: More family farce in the long-running sitcom. When Ben's uncle dies, his inheritance may not live up to expectations, but another investment causes problems.
The Psyche of Mikey: Popular sitcom. Mikey admits to seeing a therapist but refuses to discuss the reason with his parents. And why is he talking to himself?
Dog Dazed: Robert Lindsay stars in the long running sitcom about a dentist and his family. Susan decides to get another dog but, as ever, it is Ben who ends up in the doghouse!
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.
Bertie, Jade & Sophie: Lively Labrador pup Bertie has gone lame, despite his youth, while Springer Spaniel Sophie has lost her bounce with a nasty kneecap problem.
Scrumpy, Buster & Ralph: Clumber Spaniel Scrumpy needs a MRI scan on his back, Dachshund Ralph is having trouble moving, and Briard Buster returns seven years after surgery.
Gylly, Albert & Barney: A Pug and Beagle cross is hit by a bus, crushing an ankle and causing extensive damage to his leg, while a Labrador puppy has developed lameness.
Zizi, Suki & Raffa: We meet a Golden Retriever Poodle cross with painful elbows, a Labrador with constant pain in his front legs and Dachshund who lost the use of her back legs overnight.
Olive, Jazz & Remy: Cocker Spaniel puppy Remy needs two total hip replacements, two-year-old cat Jazz has a smashed femur, and Wirehaired Dachshund Olive lost the use of her back legs.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: Paramedics in Oxford treat a woman suffering from a mystery illness, while in Portsmouth, the crews treat an elderly diabetic patient with dangerously low blood sugar.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: The crews attend a man who has fallen off his bike and a 4-year-old struggling with tonsillitis. Plus, a 35-year-old man with chest pains proves very hard to find.
The team tackles a dramatic operation where a patient's heart is stopped and restarted. Zoe has a stent replaced in her ureter, which was damaged by her treatment for cancer.
Trisha has an investigation of her womb to find out if she has cancer, Steve's varicose veins are stripped from his leg, and Dennis needs an operation to strengthen his eyelid.
The hilarious sketch series with oddball characters played by the talented comedy actress. Sketches this time include Paul and Sam and the delightfully foul-mouthed Nan.
The fifth in the hit comedy sketch series featuring a gallery of characters from the 'Doctor Who' actress. Here, the foul-mouthed granny discovers a pound shop.
The last in the first series of the award-winning comedy sketch show co-written and performed by the versatile comedy actress. Are you bovvered?

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: South Central paramedics race to a newborn baby with a low temperature, while crews in Oxford and Portsmouth deal with a man vomiting blood and a patient's mysterious hip pain.
Bear Grylls: Louis goes off-grid as he spends time in the company of the adventurer and television presenter Bear Grylls, travelling with him to his private island off the coast of Wales.
Documentary exploring the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to the 'Wagatha Christie' incident, involving footballers' wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy.
Paramedics are sent to help a 49-year-old who has fallen in the street after a night out in Stoke, while in Dudley, paramedics visit a 5-month-old who has a temperature and isn't drinking.
Shopping from Home.
Flower, Heidi and Marvin: Pete meets Flower, the first dog ever to take a dislike to him - can he win her trust? He also helps Heidi and Marvin, both facing serious medical challenges.

Barnet: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team transform the home of a wheelchair-bound police officer who was a victim of the Westminster Bridge terrorist attack in March 2017.
West Bromwich: Nick Knowles and the team, together with West Bromwich volunteers, help a grieving grandmother and her family who are making do in a very small house.
Grenfell Boxing Club: Nick Knowles and the team are constructing two buildings for the Grenfell community, starting with a new home for the Dale Youth Boxing Club.

Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.
New. Mr Mac, Jersey & Reggie: The owners of Great Dane Mr Mac have noticed that he has begun to wobble when he stands, and are worried there may be a problem with the nerves in his huge neck.
New. Orla, Scooby & Kane: Samantha suffers from a rare brain condition and has been in and out of hospital much of her life, and her Labrador Scooby has been her comforter and best friend.
Barnet: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team transform the home of a wheelchair-bound police officer who was a victim of the Westminster Bridge terrorist attack in March 2017.
West Bromwich: Nick Knowles and the team, together with West Bromwich volunteers, help a grieving grandmother and her family who are making do in a very small house.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot.
Barney, Miranda & Billy: Tiny Yorkshire terrier Barney is just ten months old, but he has a deformity in his neck which is compressing his spinal cord, leaving him unable even to stand.
Villalpando vs Price: A take-charge social media influencer clashes with a sexist biker when she swaps lives with his subservient homemaker wife who prefers regressive gender roles.
Floyd-Ely vs Clanton: A gothic witch and her warlock husband swap lives with a Christian family whose deliverance ministry specializes in casting out demons and evil spirits.
